data.raceComments: {"comment":"The final leg of the quaddie is an Open Handicap over 1350m for 85K, and 2. COTE ATLANTIQUE will be the one to beat after resuming with a big effort at Ellerslie when finishing runner-up by less than a length there 5 weeks ago. He has won a Ballarat jump-out since then, and he has trekked another long distance to be here. A 3kg claim makes him well placed to take this out, despite his wide gate. 9. CASTILLIAN has hit his straps with some positive rides early on, leading to a brace of wins, including his last start here 2 weeks ago when scoring by almost a length. He drops 6kg in weight with the rise in class, but he has always promised more than he has delivered, and now is the time to realise his ability at this level. The hat-trick beckons. 8. EXOTIQUE MISS ran a much better race for this in a tough field at Toowoomba 15 days ago. She benefits from a 3kg claim, and she can take this out. 15. MARGOT'S DEEL strips fitter second up, and she has the scope to measure up in this.","runners":[2,9,8,15],"exclusive":true}
